subcodes.first_line: My dear friend, in this earthly realm the All-Glorious One hath created every manner of tribulation, sickness and affliction [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوست عزیزم جناب کبریا بو عالم ناسوتیده هر بر درلو بلا یراتمشدر امراض و علل
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness
